title: Business Model Design
shortSummary: How money flows through your business. Revenue models, unit economics, and the value chain that connects your product to your customer's wallet.
whyItMatters: A great product with a broken business model is a hobby, not a company. Understanding your business model is understanding how your business survives.
coreConcepts: A business model describes how you create, deliver, and capture value
Revenue model, cost structure, and unit economics must be coherent
Business models can be more defensible than products
The best business models create value for customers and capture a fair share
